summary: Tested tournament tabs integration (Rankings Gironi/Tabellone, Predictions tournament mode). Backend: 12/13 tests passed (92%). Found and fixed 1 bug in rankings.tsx where Gironi tab showed wrong points field.

minor.issue: Returns 404 'Matchday not found' when matchday has 0 matches. This is expected behavior for the test tournament but may need investigation if real tournament matchdays fail.

ui_bugs.issue: Points column showed 0.0 for all players because code used `s.points` but backend returns `group_points`

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: CompetitionContext provides mode, tournamentId, tournamentName (lines 18-21, 28-31)
VERIFIED: home.tsx uses setLeagueMode, setTournamentMode from context (line 60, 82, 296, 326)
VERIFIED: rankings.tsx shows Gironi + Tabellone tabs in tournament mode (lines 233, 248-255)
VERIFIED: rankings.tsx Gironi tab has G/V/P/S/Pts columns (lines 279-284)
VERIFIED: rankings.tsx Tabellone tab shows 'Disponibile dopo la fase a gironi' message (line 309)
VERIFIED: predictions.tsx fetches from /tournaments/{id}/fixtures when in tournament mode (line 150)
VERIFIED: predictions.tsx uses tournamentId as league_id for saving predictions (line 94)
VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/tournaments/{id}/fixtures returns matchdays array with correct structure
VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/tournaments/{id}/groups returns group standings with played/wins/draws/losses/group_points
VERIFIED: Backend GET /api/tournaments/{id}/bracket returns bracket organized by round_type

success_rate.frontend: Code review verified - all structures correct

context_for_next_testing_agent: Tournament tabs integration is working. Rankings tab conditionally renders Gironi + Tabellone when competitionMode === 'tournament'. Gironi shows group standings with G/V/P/S/Pts columns. Tabellone shows bracket or 'Disponibile dopo la fase a gironi' message. Predictions tab fetches from /tournaments/{id}/fixtures in tournament mode. Bug was found and fixed: Gironi Pts column now correctly uses s.group_points instead of s.points.

verified_features.backend_fixtures_endpoint: PASS - Returns matchdays array with id, label, number, status, matches
verified_features.backend_groups_endpoint: PASS - Returns groups with standings containing played/wins/draws/losses/group_points
verified_features.backend_bracket_endpoint: PASS - Returns bracket organized by round_type (semifinal, etc.)
verified_features.backend_tournament_detail: PASS - Returns status field for conditional rendering
verified_features.frontend_gironi_columns: PASS - Shows G/V/P/S/Pts columns (FIXED points field)
verified_features.frontend_tabellone_message: PASS - Shows 'Disponibile dopo la fase a gironi' when not in knockout phase

gironi_points_column.reason: Backend returns group_points but frontend was using s.points
